prompt:
Reference images of two characters
+
Please create a pale colored pencil illustration in the style of an album containing sets of photos of these two characters. A composition with one striking photo in the center, surrounded by other photos. A collection of lively photos showing them traveling through various countries and world-lines, wearing suitable clothes, and engaging in activities rooted in different lives and cultures. Emotions of joy, anger, sorrow, and pleasure seen from doodles and memory notes probably written by each. Includes easy-to-understand symbols indicating who wrote which. Interaction between doodles and notes. Hair styles and accessories should be freely changed to match the clothing.
